class.name: DSVImporter
class.description: DSVImporter parses CSV, TSV, PSV, and other single-character delimiter-separated text into arrays of strings. It handles quoted fields, escaped quotes, CRLF/LF/CR line endings, and supports configurable row-length handling, field trimming, empty-row skipping, and comment rows.

method.name: import
method.description: Parses the file at [param file_path] into an array of [PackedStringArray] rows. Supports [param options] keys [code]trim_fields[/code], [code]skip_empty_rows[/code], [code]comment_prefixes[/code], [code]row_length_mode[/code], [code]null_values[/code], [code]true_values[/code], and [code]false_values[/code].

method.name: import_string
method.description: Parses [param string] into an array of [PackedStringArray] rows. Supports [param options] keys [code]trim_fields[/code], [code]skip_empty_rows[/code], [code]comment_prefixes[/code], [code]row_length_mode[/code], [code]null_values[/code], [code]true_values[/code], and [code]false_values[/code].
